theme.description: A warm, premium, and human-centric design that avoids the sterile 'tech-bro' look and the childish gamified aesthetic. It feels like a high-end language academy combined with cutting-edge AI. The interface uses generous spacing, organic earthy colors, and sharp typography to build trust and calmness.

headings.usage: Expressive, geometric but friendly. Used for H1-H4. Must use tracking-tight for large sizes.

body.usage: Highly legible, slightly technical for grammar explanations and transcripts.

mono.usage: Used for grammar correction tokens, phonetic spellings, and vocabulary badges.

hierarchy_rules: H1 (Hero): text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium text-charcoal
H2 (Section): text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium text-charcoal
Overline/Labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-sage

rules: Never use pure black or pure white. All neutrals are tinted with warmth.
Primary (Terracotta) is reserved strictly for primary CTAs and Maya's voice interactions.
Sage is used for progress, successful states, and secondary structural elements.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers.

grids.marketing: Asymmetric Bento grids. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with gap-8. Mix tall and wide blocks.
grids.dashboard: Strict, dense grids for analytics. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Use h-full to align bottoms.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (surface), 1px solid border (#E5E4E0), no shadow by default. Hover adds subtle translate-y and soft ambient shadow.
surfaces.glass: Used only for sticky header. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px border-b border-white/20.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for primary actions. Geometric (rounded-md) for secondary/utility actions. Always explicitly set hover text colors.

chat_interface.style: Flowing transcript rather than generic iMessage bubbles.
chat_interface.maya_message: Left-aligned, larger text (text-xl or text-2xl), serif or elegant sans, accompanied by a subtle breathing orb visualizer.
chat_interface.user_message: Right-aligned, standard text. Grammar mistakes are struck through with inline corrections appearing above them in mono font.
chat_interface.input_area: Voice-first. A large, prominent, pulsating Terracotta microphone button centered at the bottom, surrounded by minimal text input options.

scenario_cards.style: Large interactive cards featuring the 3D diorama images. 1px border, off-white background. On hover, the image scales up slightly (scale-105) and border turns Sage.

grammar_panel.style: A side-drawer or floating panel (glassmorphism or solid surface) that breaks down the user's last spoken sentence. Uses mono-spaced tags for parts of speech.

motion_and_animations.voice_orb: Maya's representation. A CSS/Framer-motion element that uses box-shadow (multiple layers) and scale to simulate 'breathing' when idle, and rapid pulsing when speaking.
motion_and_animations.page_transitions: Soft fade and slight upward translation (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) staggered for grid items.
motion_and_animations.hover_states: Cards lift -translate-y-1 with transition-transform 0.3s ease-out. Buttons use background color transitions.
motion_and_animations.waveform: When the user speaks, use a canvas or CSS-animated bar visualizer tied to mock audio input levels.

hero_visual.description: Minimalist 3D soft sphere representing Maya the AI. Use in the hero section.

feature_grammar.description: 3D abstract composition of speech bubbles. Use in the 'How it works' or features section.

scenario_cafe.description: 3D diorama of a modern cafe scene. Use for the 'Order at a Cafe' roleplay scenario card.

scenario_interview.description: 3D diorama of an office room. Use for the 'Job Interview' roleplay scenario card.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use `framer-motion` for the voice orb animations, page transitions, and scenario card hover effects.
Use pure Tailwind CSS for the marketing landing page layout, avoiding rigid Shadcn layouts to achieve organic asymmetry.
For the Chat UI, do NOT use generic chat bubbles. Create a seamless, flowing transcript layout where the AI's text feels prominent and the user's text displays real-time inline corrections.
Implement the Dashboard using Shadcn UI components (tabs, cards) but override default border-radii and shadows to match the 'flat with 1px border' rule.
Ensure the hero section uses the `hero_voice_orb` image prominently, perhaps partially cropped or floating next to the main H1.
In the Scenario picker, use the `scenario_cafe` and `scenario_interview` images in beautiful large cards with an aspect ratio of 16:9 or 4:3.
The fonts (Outfit and Fira Sans) must be imported from Google Fonts in the index.html or global css.
